en_title: With the Threat of Layoffs Looming, Quantic Dream Staff Say They're Going on Strike to Save Star Wars Eclipse From Cancelation
cn_title: QD员工罢工，力保《星球大战：日食》
subtitle: 达摩克利斯之剑
opus_summary: 在取消《咒术编年史》并拟裁员115人后，Quantic Dream员工展开罢工，力求挽救因资源匮乏而前景未卜的《星球大战：日食》。卢卡斯影业代表团原定罢工当日访查，目前工会正推动签署协议以减少失业。

paragraphs.en: A new report has shed light on the goings on at French studio Quantic Dream and revealed concern about the future of Star Wars Eclipse.
paragraphs.cn: 一份新报道揭示了法国工作室Quantic Dream的内部动态，并透露了人们对《星球大战：日食》未来的担忧。

paragraphs.en: Last month, Quantic Dream canceled its live service game, Spellcasters Chronicles , just three months after its early access launch. The studio best known for successful single-player story-driven games, such as Heavy Rain , Beyond: Two Souls , and Detroit: Become Human , signalled that the Spellcasters Chronicles cancelation would result in layoffs, although it has yet to say how many are affected.
paragraphs.cn: 上个月，Quantic Dream取消了其服务型游戏《咒术编年史》，距其抢先体验上线仅三个月。这家以成功制作单机剧情驱动游戏而闻名的工作室，曾推出《暴雨》《超凡双生》和《底特律：成为人类》等作品，表示取消《咒术编年史》将导致裁员，但尚未透露受影响的具体人数。

paragraphs.en: At the time of the cancelation, Quantic Dream insisted the development of Star Wars Eclipse “is not affected by this decision and continues as planned.” But according to French website gamekult , Eclipse is suffering from “a lack of resources, vision, and progress.” IGN has asked Quantic Dream for comment.
paragraphs.cn: 在取消《咒术编年史》时，Quantic Dream坚称《星球大战：日食》的开发「不受此决定影响，并继续按计划进行」。但据法国网站Gamekult报道，《日食》正面临「资源、愿景和进展方面的不足」。IGN已向Quantic Dream寻求置评。

paragraphs.en: Announced in 2021 via a flashy cinematic trailer , Star Wars Eclipse has flown under the radar in the years since. Set within the franchise's High Republic era, Eclipse is expected to integrate Quantic Dreams' traditional story-based gameplay with an action-adventure game set in the Star Wars universe.
paragraphs.cn: 于2021年通过一支华丽的电影式预告片公布后，《星球大战：日食》此后数年一直低调。游戏设定在系列的高共和国时期，《日食》预计将融合Quantic Dream传统的叙事导向玩法与《星球大战》宇宙中的动作冒险游戏体验。

paragraphs.en: Beyond that, details on what to expect remain thin on the ground, and Quantic Dream has only commented on the project over the past few years to quash rumors of development trouble and delays , amid suggestions that the studio was struggling to hire staff following previous workplace allegations . Star Wars Eclipse is still without a release window even now, five years after it was announced.
paragraphs.cn: 除此之外，关于游戏细节仍然寥寥无几，而Quantic Dream在过去几年中对这个项目的表态，仅限于辟谣开发困境和延期传闻，当时有迹象表明该工作室因早前的职场指控而难以招聘人员。即使距离公布已过去五年，《星球大战：日食》至今仍无发售窗口。

paragraphs.en: Gamekult said Quantic Dream is reportedly considering laying off 115 staff — said to amount to a quarter of the company’s workforce — following the cancelation of Spellcasters Chronicles, which itself sparked a strike organized by the STJV union that took place in front of the studio’s Paris headquarters. Gamekult said striking staff are trying to save Star Wars Eclipse. They believe at least some of the Spellcasters Chronicles developers who are set to lose their jobs will be needed to make Star Wars Eclipse a reality without enduring staff crunch.
paragraphs.cn: Gamekult称，据报道，Quantic Dream正考虑在取消《咒术编年史》后裁员115人——据说占公司员工总数的四分之一。此事件本身引发了由STJV工会组织的罢工，在工作室巴黎总部前举行。Gamekult表示，罢工员工正在试图挽救《星球大战：日食》。他们认为，至少有一部分面临失业的《咒术编年史》开发者，对于在不承受加班压力的情况下让《星球大战：日食》成为现实，仍是必不可缺的。

paragraphs.en: Apparently, on the day of the strike (June 25), a delegation from Lucasfilm was due to visit Quantic Dream to check the progress of Star Wars Eclipse. The striking staff wanted to send a clear message: as things stand, Eclipse cannot be finished if the redundancy plan goes through, or, as gamekult put it: "saving the company from a very painful cancellation, which currently hangs like a sword of Damocles over the employees."
paragraphs.cn: 据悉，在罢工当天（6月25日），卢卡斯影业的一个代表团原定到访Quantic Dream，检视《星球大战：日食》的开发进展。罢工员工希望传达一个明确信息：在目前情况下，如果裁员计划得以实施，《日食》将无法完成。或者如Gamekult所说：「这是为了拯救公司，避免一次极其痛苦的取消——这件事目前就像达摩克利斯之剑悬在员工头顶。」

paragraphs.en: Last year, Quantic Dream was forced to respond to closure fears amid a pullback from western gaming companies from Chinese owner NetEase .
paragraphs.cn: 在中国所有者网易对西方游戏公司收缩投资的背景下，Quantic Dream去年被迫回应关于工作室关闭的担忧。

paragraphs.en: In a statement posted to LinkedIn, Quantic Dream CEO and head of publishing, Guillaume de Fondaumière, said he was "deeply saddened to learn about the recent layoffs and studio closures affecting some of the NetEase group’s divisions," but assured players that Quantic's studios in Paris and Montreal remain "unaffected."
paragraphs.cn: Quantic Dream首席执行官兼发行负责人Guillaume de Fondaumière在LinkedIn发布声明称，他「得知网易集团部分部门近期的裁员和工作室关闭深感悲痛」，但向玩家保证，Quantic在巴黎和蒙特利尔的工作室仍然「未受影响」。

paragraphs.en: "[Quantic president] David Cage and I would like to express our gratitude to the fans and friends who have reached out to us in recent days regarding Quantic Dream," de Fondaumière wrote. "We want to reassure everyone that our studios in Paris and Montreal remain unaffected. We are continuing to develop our projects at full pace, with several open positions available in both locations."
paragraphs.cn: de Fondaumière写道：「[Quantic总裁]David Cage和我，向最近几天就Quantic Dream联系我们表达的粉丝与朋友致以感激。我们想向大家保证，我们在巴黎和蒙特利尔的工作室仍然未受影响。我们正全速推进各项目，两处地点均有多个开放职位。」

paragraphs.en: de Fondaumière added that despite NetEase acquiring Quantic Dream as a wholly owned subsidiary in 2022, "Quantic Dream remains committed to the strategy outlined by David and I in 2019," insisting "NetEase has been a dedicated partner, providing us with creative freedom and the financial resources necessary for our studio to grow and strive."
paragraphs.cn: de Fondaumière补充道，尽管网易在2022年将Quantic Dream收购为全资子公司，但「Quantic Dream仍致力于David和我于2019年制定的战略」，并坚称「网易一直是我们专注的合作伙伴，为工作室的成长与发展提供创作自由和必要的财务资源。」

paragraphs.en: The CEO also revealed the studio's back-catalog had seen an "exceptional performance," contributing to the "highest revenue in [the company's] history" in 2024.
paragraphs.cn: 这位CEO还透露，工作室过往作品销量表现「异常出色」，推动2024年创下了「公司历史上最高营收」。

paragraphs.en: "The developments of our current projects are progressing as planned, and we are fully committed to delivering and launching these innovative, high-quality titles in the future," de Fondaumière said, but did not provide any specific update on its upcoming Star Wars game, Star Wars: Eclipse.
paragraphs.cn: 「我们当前项目的开发正按计划推进，我们也全力投入，将来交付并推出这些创新、高品质的作品。」de Fondaumière 说道，但并未提供关于其正在开发中的《星球大战：日食》的任何具体新进展。

paragraphs.en: In March, it was revealed that NetEase cut off funding to the studio led by Yakuza franchise creator Toshihiro Nagoshi as part of its plan to reduce its video game development activities. Nagoshi’s game, Gang of Dragon, now appears to have been canceled. Could Star Wars Eclipse endure a similar fate?
paragraphs.cn: 今年3月曾有消息称，网易已切断对《如龙》系列创作者名越稔洋所领导工作室的资金支持，作为其缩减游戏开发业务计划的一部分。名越稔洋的新作《Gang of Dragon》现在看来已被取消。《星球大战：日食》会否面临同样的命运？

paragraphs.en: As for the staff at Quantic Dream, union discussions are said to be ongoing. STJV wants the studio to sign a majority agreement with the union to mitigate the damage and move forward, which would in theory see fewer staff lose their jobs, and the remaining staff helping to get Eclipse out the door.
paragraphs.cn: 至于 Quantic Dream 的员工，工会协商据称仍在进行中。STJV 希望工作室与工会签署一份多数协议，以减轻损失并继续推进工作——理论上，这将使更少的员工丢掉工作，剩下的员工则协助把《日食》推出市面。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley 是 IGN 新闻总监。你可以在 X 上通过 @wyp100 找到他，也可通过 wesley_yinpoole@ign.com 或机密邮箱 wyp100@proton.me 联系 Wesley。
